title: Eventrix
description: Eventrix is a MERN stack web application for renting event equipment, featuring full CRUD capabilities for inventory management.

title: Snapflix
description: SnapFlix is a simple and user-friendly movie booking website. It allows users to browse movies that are now showing or coming soon and book tickets easily.

title: Task Manager Web App
description: Engineered a secure task management dashboard featuring user authentication, dynamic CRUD operations, and personalized task filtering

title: Portfolio Website
description: Designed a data-driven portfolio to showcase software engineering projects, dynamically loading content from a structured JSON file.

title: Fit Tracker App
description: Developed a privacy centric wellness tool specifically designed for tracking daily habits, hydration, and emotional well-being.
